persons.arguments_against: Compiled as single-initial (given_names='Cecil' = one token). But 'Cecil' is a full forename, the surname Clementi is rare (OCR 'CLEMEN'TI'), and the entry states governor of Hong Kong from 1925 — matching the 1927-1929 HK listing. Risk is low; the only caveat is the mechanical single-initial flag.
persons.would_overturn: A second same-surname person in the same colony and years holding the same office, or a printed death/birth date excluding these years.
